title: corylus californica
intro: Corylus californica, also known as the California hazelnut, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the western United States. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Corylus californica include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Corylus californica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
